subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who hath ordained for them that are nigh unto Him to drink from the chalice of grievous tribulation, and Who hath then purchased from the believers their souls through the encounter with His Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی قدر للمقربین من کاوس بلاء عظیم ثم اشتری عن المومنین انفسهم بلقاء اسم
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude
